title: Kaiju Kraft
description:
Kaiju Craft (Minecraft 1.20.1 Java)
Immerse yourself in the world of the hit anime and manga series Kaiju No.8 with this Minecraft mod! Transform your gameplay by encountering fearsome kaiju, wielding powerful abilities, and donning specialized armor insp
body:
![Logo](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/filbfb69k9sylw0jmkpyz/Kaiju-Kraft.png?rlkey=7ojrfm3opukus9hwc65suma2n&st=5xsbsmq8&dl=1)
Kaiju Kraft (Minecraft 1.20.1 Java)

Immerse yourself in the world of the hit anime and manga series Kaiju No.8 with this Minecraft mod! Transform your gameplay by encountering fearsome kaiju, wielding powerful abilities, and donning specialized armor inspired by the series. Whether you fight off monstrous threats or harness their power, the Kaiju No.8 Mod offers a thrilling experience for fans and newcomers alike.

Mod Highlights:

Kaiju Encounters: Face off against formidable kaiju from the series, each with unique abilities and challenges.
Transformative Abilities: Gain and master the incredible powers of Kaiju No.8, bringing a whole new level of combat to Minecraft.
Custom Armor & Weapons: Equip yourself with iconic gear from the series, designed for both style and protection.
Original Artwork & Modeling: Experience the world of Kaiju No.8 with stunning models and textures crafted by Ducas.
RPG Capabilities: This mod also has many aspects including ranks, leveling, points, and many more to come in the future.

Prepare for epic battles and become the hero your world needs!

Please Note:
**This mod is currently within its Beta stage meaning many aspects listed above have yet to be implemented or are being completed. Keep in mind certain Items won't have functions so please be patient while we continue to work on the fully finished and completed mod. The purpose of this early release is to show what is in store for the future of this mod and allow our audience to see the effort we've already put into the mod. If you do wish to support the development of the mod and wanna view more features of the mod please join our discord and tell us your thoughts on how we can make our project better: https://discord.gg/Am352A9hXC**



(Planned) PROGRESSION:
- When spawning into the world of Kaiju no 8 first step will be crafting a monster sweeper INC. cleaning outfit, to craft the suit you must make leather armor and surround the armor in white wool. Once the armor is crafted the player's next goal will be to craft a pneumatic chainsaw to fulfill the next part of your progression.
- Within this surface on the player's world, players will have to search around for small deposits of kaiju remains (Generated Entity). When mining these deposits you'll require a pneumatic chainsaw to have a chance to collect fresh kaiju muscles. With these muscles players can use them to repair JAKDF combat suits and create Private Combat Suits (Will be useful for the JAKDF exam). However, the player must be quick to use the muscle or they'll rot; with rotten muscles, you'll still be able to craft a private suit but the suit created will be a Weakened Private Combat Suit and its power output will be a quarter of the regular Private Suits power output.
- Now that the player has a private suit, a portion of the JAKDF exam will become a lot simpler. The exam will be two parts a physical and a practical portion. The physical portion of the exam will be shifting a certain amount of times, jumping a certain amount of times, and killing a certain amount of mobs. The practical portion of the exam will require the player to exterminate a single **Yoju** (The Private Suit will come in handy when taking on this kaiju). Once the Exam is completed you'll officially be a part of the JAKDF and you'll receive a JAKDF Combat Suit.
- With this combat suit and the role of a JAKDF member you'll have access to JAKDF weapons, edit and use skill points, your combat power, access to certain NPC shops, and have an easier time killing kaiju. By the off chance you lose your combat suit, you'll have to buy it back from an NPC but at a hefty price. These suits do deteriorate over time so be sure to collect kaiju muscles to repair it.

(Planned) PROGRESSION: [Extras]
- There is a possibility to craft numbered combat suits that require you to kill and extract cores from numbered kaiju and obtain another set of JADKF combat suits as a base.
- Within the world, you can recruit certain NPCs to fight with you when dealing with more difficult kaiju. You'll have to pay them with either resources or currency for them to agree to team up with you. (To recruit them you'll have to have already passed the JAKDF exam)
- Players will have a chance to craft an item called a contained kaiju muscle, unlike your average kaiju muscle this item doesn't rot and can be stored for as long as you need but this item doesn't stack so it takes an entire slot. To craft contained kaiju muscle you'll have to first acquire a normal kaiju muscle through whatever means and then use glass and a mix of other resources to create the contained muscle.
- Certain weapons within the anime can be acquired by trading with the user. These weapons can also be used in addition to kaiju cores to craft certain numbered kaiju armored pieces
